name: Swing Theory Indoor Golf
address: 1990 N U. S. Hwy 31 N Ste C, Traverse City, MI 49686
about: Swing Theory Indoor Golf is a golf simulator venue in Traverse City, Michigan, equipped with Trackman 4 launch monitors and premium furnishings. The facility offers over 450 courses, including 50+ tour venues, with complete ball and club data. It features a comfortable, modern atmosphere with a bar serving beer and wine, and is fully staffed. Membership options are available, offering bulk discounts, along with leagues, lessons, and tee time reservations through an online booking system.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman 4 technology for unparalleled accuracy and data analysis
Professional-grade practice experience with immediate swing feedback
Wide variety of course options including 50+ tour venues
Welcoming atmosphere suitable for all skill levels
Bartop beverage service for a complete golf experience

food_and_drink.notes: No food service is mentioned on the website.
Expert selection of beer and wine available at the bar.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor providing complete ball and club data without stickers.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available, but it is common practice for simulator venues to provide clubs or allow you to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed inside the simulator bays. The facility has a bartop beverage service with an expert selection of beer and wine available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes, as it depends on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is Swing Theory kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state if it is kid-friendly, but it offers lessons and a welcoming atmosphere which suggests it may accommodate juniors.
